item: Auto switch (can the engine automatically switch from reading snapshot data to reading incremental data?)
Parallel initial snapshot reading per table (can the engine replicate 1 table in parallel by chunks?)
Lock-free reading (can the engine avoid acquiring a global read lock during snapshotting and thus avoid user lock permissions)
Checkpointing (can the engine provide the ability to perform checkpoint in chunk level?/is it possible to pause and resume during snapshotting?)
Column inclusion/exclusion (can the user specify what fields/columns to include/exclude from a table to be replicated?)
Table inclusion/exclusion (can the user specify what tables to include/exclude in the replication process?)
Flink CDC: [Only possible with DataStream API; Table/SQL API can be used for monitoring changes on a single table](https://ververica.github.io/flink-cdc-connectors/master/content/about.html?highlight=datastream#features)
